entry.title: sweet-tea (in the summer)
entry.summary:
Author: finalgirlkenobi

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,779Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 0

Summary: ‘Uncle Buck?’ Jee asks, once they’ve all calmed down and her attention shifts back to the tea party.‘Yeah, sweetie?’‘Can I wear my Elsa dress to yours and Uncle Eddie’s wedding?’In what is possibly his least proudest moment, Buck chokes on his tea. On his invisible, not really there because they’re having a pretend tea party, tea.or,what if you realise you're in love with your best friend when you're having a princess themed tea party with your niece

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: A Childhood given, a life loved
entry.summary:
Author: Sian98

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,294Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 62

Summary: When Buck impulsively decides to adopt a baby from Safe Haven. Aurora, a tiny, impossibly charming little girl, becomes the center of attention and chaos from the moment she enters their lives.

entry.title: My Life as Derek
entry.summary:
Author: nfarious

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 31,074Chapters: 22/22Kudos: 128

Summary: After surviving a traumatic kidnapping by Bonnie and Earl, who tried to force him into the role of their brain-dead son Derek, Evan "Buck" Buckley convinces himself the ordeal is behind him and skips therapy. On his way home from the station late at night, he is violently ambushed and abducted again—this time by an unseen captor wearing a grotesque Halloween mask. He awakens with a splitting headache inside an enormous, twisted adult-sized "nursery" painted in pastel blue, with giant block letters on the wall reading **DEREK’S NURSERY**. The room is a nightmarish blend of infantilizing comfort and dungeon-like control: oversized crib with steel bars, massive changing table with restraints, shelves of thick printed diapers, a playpen, and a huge rocking chair. Buck realizes his ordeal isn't over and that someone else wants him to be Derek. Question now is who and why?

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence
  • Major Character Death
  • Rape/Non-Con
  • Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV)

entry.title: Got Your Back (Got You Babe)
entry.summary:
Author: IrishMum1710

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,758Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 28

Summary: Christopher has known Buck longer than he’d known Shannon.It’s a quiet realisation.But for Eddie, it changes everything—about the past, about the life they’ve built, and about Buck.

entry.title: Dean Begins (Again)
entry.summary:
Author: redwinesupernatural

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 39,120Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 242

Summary: Chuck was gone, the world was safe, and Jack was the new God of this joint.Dean Winchester decided to use his new found freedom of responsibilities to pack up and move to Los Angeles to stick his feet in the sand, get some sun, enjoy the movie magic in motion, and decide how he wants to spend the rest of his life. He was definitely not running away from the personal consequences and feelings of the past few months.At least, that is what he had thought at first.He did not expect to be peer pressured into attending Alcoholics Anonymous by Sam, Jody, and by extension the wayward sisters and Eileen, when they decided that Dean needed to stop with the liquor and spirits, and instead deal with the ghosts of grief weighing down his shoulders.He also didn't expect to be taken under the wing of a firefighting captain with the same name as one of the ghosts he was running from.

entry.title: Allies or Enemies
entry.summary:
Author: runechesters

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 70,474Chapters: 17/35Kudos: 66

Summary: Buck straightened up, looking Eddie up and down. “I’d still take you.” “You think?” “I know.” he said, puffing out his chest. They both laughed, and Buck looked down at his feet, before looking earnestly back up at Eddie. “Thank you,” he said quietly, “for having my back”. Eddie smiled despite himself. “I’ll see you in there, Buckley, and maybe you can have mine.” --- In which Evan Buckley is a District 5 power plant engineer and Eddie Diaz is a District 2 Career Academy trainee. It’s Eddie’s final chance to volunteer for the games. This was always the plan: get in, win, get out. Christopher is taken care of for a lifetime. He’s not looking to make any waves. In comes Evan “tsunami” Buckley to ruin all his plans. Welcome everyone to the 98th annual Hunger Games! Or The slow-burn enemies-to-friends-to-lovers Hunger Games AU buddie long-fic you’ve been waiting for!!

entry.title: Finding Those Lost
entry.summary:
Author: Not_Ren_42

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 18,618Chapters: 6/24Kudos: 243

Summary: Evangaline ‘Buck’ Buckley has made a home for herself in LA. After the long and difficult path to get here, she doesn’t think there is much left to surprise her. She has a new family, her son is thriving, and she’s loving her work as a firefighter. So what if sometimes the dark still comes for her some nights? When a new firefighter starts at the station, everything Buck thought she knew is thrown up in the air as she tries to keep her past and private life together. Things only get worse when dispatch starts messing the whole station around. -+- A season 2 rewrite that won't make much sense unless you've read part 1.

entry.title: You are my home
entry.summary:
Author: Enti13666

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 53,016Chapters: 17/?Kudos: 458

Summary: When Christopher calls his grandparents after seeing his father with a copy of his mother, he was hoping for a few weeks of peace in El Paso. What he didn't expect was for his grandparents to sue his father for custody. When his father clearly doesn't want him and doesn't show up in court, Chris does the only thing he can. He calls his Buck. Buck has never let him down before.

entry.title: Calling for Abuela's Help
entry.summary:
Author: Wallflower_Lady

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,424Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 32

Summary: “Oh mijo, don’t be silly. We knew this day would come!” Abuela cooed while Pepe stood up, her chair scraping backward.“What day?” Buck asked, confused.“Your engagement of course!” Pepa said, making Buck rear back puzzled. His face is a pure reflection of bewilderment.

entry.summary:

entry.title: With All the Weight of the World
entry.summary:
Author: Veronae

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,913Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 26

Summary: "I came here to help you. You've said what you need. Your call, Buck." "Jesus, Eddie." "Just regular Eddie." Staring at him, Buck shook his head. "Nothing about you is 'just regular'," he murmured. "You're amazing. Would … would you really do that?"Buck says what he needs, and Eddie gives it to him. And then Buck returns the favour.

entry.title: Don't be homophobic Madison
entry.summary:
Author: pineapplehazard

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 27,645Chapters: 17/?Kudos: 470

Summary: Eddie : His posture was horrible!! And he WAS NOT on rythmBut because he managed to lift her twice without letting her fall that deserves 7s??? Maddie : WowWhat kind of monster did I create...?  Eddie :UghSee that's why I didn't want to watch this showIt's giving me flashbacks Maddie : Flashbacks?? 😳Flashbacks of what EXACTLY?? EDDIEEDMUNDOANSWER ME Eddie : I'll tell youBut Buck can't know about this ok?  Maddie : OMG a secret Buck doesn't know!!! 😵 Eddie : Don't make me regret it. Maddie :I'm not afraid of you 🔫Spill.  Eddie : I... I used to be a ballroom dancing champion?  Maddie : WHAAAAAAAAAAT🫵🤨 = 🕺? ________________ Eddie and Maddie finally start to interact just as Eddie is leaving for El Paso.Gossips, beef with Josh and matchmaking involved. (Canon until 8x13)

entry.title: Buprenorphine and Pink Brandywines
entry.summary:
Author: pyrolysis (bertrandsbakingchannel)

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,431Chapters: 6/10Kudos: 35

Summary: Eddie Diaz doesn’t remember most of his life going by. Buck’s been talking about it lately (when he actually talks to Eddie about things that matters), about how fast they’re getting older. Eddie isn’t sure he’s ready to be satisfied with what he’s done with life. Eddie isn’t sure he’s done everything he wants to yet, but maybe he should try to.   Eddie trying to do things that make him happy, but he sucks at it. Or, how Eddie Diaz mistakes chest pain for happiness.

entry.title: Ruins
entry.summary:
Author: jjpopeshipper

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,308Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 2

Summary: Buck puts a hand on their uncrushed side of their face, “I’m here, it’s okay. You’re going to be okay, I swear.” Their skin twitches beneath his hand and they groan once more. “My name–” They rasp before coughing again, blood dribbling down their lips, flowing into the crevices of their broken and battered face. Buck waits with bated breath.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: Delayed in the Air
entry.summary:
Author: Frank1e_Verse

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,350Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 24

Summary: Evan Buckley is a flight attendant starting out the international airline, Guardian Air. He’s finally moved out to LA to be closer to his sister and still gets to travel. It all seems perfect to him until he starts and meets a new pilot for the airline, Captain Diaz. Following a separation from his wife, former Air Force pilot Eddie Diaz has just made the leap from private to commercial air to spend more time with his son. He loves his new crew and most of the co-pilots with the airline, but for some reason he keeps butting heads with a gorgeous flight attendant who seems to hate him, and he can’t figure out why.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Addicted to the Pain
entry.summary:
Author: 911fan_gir1

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 770Chapters: 1/4Kudos: 7

Summary: Evan was six when he crashed his, or Daniel’s, though he didn’t know it at the time, bike. That day Evan split his lip, and skinned both his knees. The crash was made out of most kid’s nightmares, but Evan would be lying if he said it wasn’t one of the best days he could remember. His dad had taken him to buy a brand new bike, and let him choose. He, naturally, chose a bright blue one with a superman bell. Pretty epic, he knows. The day however significant it felt at the time, really should’ve been forgettable in the grand scheme of childhood. But it was as Evan’s lips sunk into triple chocolate chip ice cream that his brain made the connection that would drive the majority of his life: Pain is good. Or Buck's relationship with pain, self-harm, and himself throughout time

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
